item.title: Taking a Chance on a 100 Dollar Mystery Car
item.description: What do you get when you spend just 100 dollars on a complete mystery car? Chevy Dude takes the plunge and finds out, turning a risky gamble into one of the most entertaining reveals you will see. Would you ever spend 100 dollars on a car without knowing what you were getting?

media:content.media:title: Taking a Chance on a 100 Dollar Mystery Car
media:content.media:description: What do you get when you spend just 100 dollars on a complete mystery car? Chevy Dude takes the plunge and finds out, turning a risky gamble into one of the most entertaining reveals you will see. Would you ever spend 100 dollars on a car without knowing what you were getting?

item.title: The challenges of used car sales
item.description: Highlighting ssues like negative equity, unreliable inventory, and dealer add-ons that make used car buying risky.Highlights issues like negative equity, unreliable inventory, and dealer add-ons that make used car buying risky.

media:content.media:title: The challenges of used car sales
media:content.media:description: Highlighting ssues like negative equity, unreliable inventory, and dealer add-ons that make used car buying risky.Highlights issues like negative equity, unreliable inventory, and dealer add-ons that make used car buying risky.

item.title: Using Locking Lug Nuts Properly
item.description: Exploring why locking lug nuts offer little real protection and highlights common pitfalls in used car sales, including negative equity and overpriced inventory.

media:content.media:title: Using Locking Lug Nuts Properly
media:content.media:description: Exploring why locking lug nuts offer little real protection and highlights common pitfalls in used car sales, including negative equity and overpriced inventory.

item.title: A closer look at this repair
item.description: The details of this repair reveal more than meets the eye. From unexpected challenges to clever solutions, the process shows how persistence and skill can turn a tough job around. What hidden issues came up, and how were they solved?

media:content.media:title: A closer look at this repair
media:content.media:description: The details of this repair reveal more than meets the eye. From unexpected challenges to clever solutions, the process shows how persistence and skill can turn a tough job around. What hidden issues came up, and how were they solved?

item.title: Ask a Pro for Help
item.description: Sometimes expertise makes all the difference. When is it best to call in a pro for guidance?

media:content.media:title: Ask a Pro for Help
media:content.media:description: Sometimes expertise makes all the difference. When is it best to call in a pro for guidance?

item.title: How to sell a car online
item.description: From listings to buyers, the digital marketplace has its quirks. What should you know before selling a car online?
